query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('contactId', 'leadId') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME;
